title: pilea repens var. strigosa
intro: Pilea repens var. strigosa, also known as Creeping Alumroot or Wire Vine Pilea, is a type of flowering plant in the Urticaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pilea repens var. strigosa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Pilea repens var. strigosa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits.
